browserNote: In-app browser backend was unavailable; audit used source-backed visible surface review plus localhost API checks.

scenario1.question: Can a tradesman or construction company get JobFilter paid value for free without effort?
scenario1.summary: The free scanner exposes paid-value fields in API responses and in parts of the UI, including buyer, deadline, source confidence, full reasons, status, and official URL. Pricing and scanner copy claim these fields are Pro value.

issues.copyOrSurface: Free view shows the score and signal. Pro unlocks WhatsApp delivery, saved leads, buyer detail, and full action workflow.
issues.problem: The API returns buyer, URL, deadline, score reasons, and status for free.
issues.recommendedFix: Create a redacted free lead DTO server-side and only return paid fields after entitlement.

issues.copyOrSurface: Buyer card renders lead.buyer when present.
issues.problem: Buyer detail appears in the free result card despite being described as Pro.
issues.recommendedFix: Always render locked buyer state for free users and redact buyer from API.

issues.copyOrSurface: Local API test returned buyer names, official source URLs, deadlines, full reasons, scores, and status.
issues.problem: Paid fields are available without account or payment.
issues.recommendedFix: Server-side plan gating, quota enforcement, and response redaction.

issues.copyOrSurface: FREE TOOLS FOREVER / No catch. Use them before you pay us.
issues.problem: This overpromises free access when scanner is limited and paid detail should be gated.
issues.recommendedFix: Change to: Free calculators stay free. Lead detail unlocks on Pro.

issues.copyOrSurface: 2 scans per week on Free / Unlimited scans on Pro
issues.problem: The visible product claims a quota but the tested scanner allowed immediate use without account identity.
issues.recommendedFix: Enforce quota server-side per authenticated user or at minimum per IP/session.

issues.copyOrSurface: Free link sharing, lead scoring, call, save, ignore flow.
issues.problem: This overlaps with saved-lead workflow value if intended as paid.
issues.recommendedFix: Either gate it or explicitly position it as a free intake teaser with Pro limits.

scenario1.highestRisk: Scanner API leaks paid lead detail.
scenario1.recommendedPriority: Fix server-side redaction and quota enforcement before copy cleanup.

scenario2.name: dailytools test
scenario2.summary: Free tools are visible and usable, but they are basic calculators rather than strong daily decision tools for trade businesses.

tools.usefulness: Quick labour, materials, and margin estimate.
Shows annual cost of wasted time, miles, and bad visits.

gaps: No parking, tolls, ULEZ, or van running cost

headlineFindings: YES, paid value can be accessed for free through scanner data.
The paid boundary is described in copy but not enforced in the response layer.
Free tools are usable but too basic to become daily trade business habits.
The live scanner is both the strongest free tool and the biggest revenue leak.
exactRisks: Revenue leak from free buyer/source/deadline/API detail.
Trust risk because Pro buyer-detail copy is contradicted by free output.
Abuse risk because 2 scans/week is claimed but not visibly enforced.
Product risk because daily tools lack lead filtering decisions.
